title: senecio vulgaris
intro: Senecio vulgaris, also known as common ragwort, is a perennial flowering plant in the daisy family native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Senecio vulgaris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
